case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. BARRISH BAIL BONDS et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT BARRISH BAIL BONDS AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE CO.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARRISH BAIL BONDS AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE CO. $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $583.00, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER CRC 522
